accepted.reason: Triangular-loop ODE update plus moment aggregation is a clean numeric kernel for Cython acceleration.
4x4 coercion and matrix multiplication provide reusable fixed-size linear-algebra loop patterns.
Permutation-driven grid construction supplies deterministic indexing-heavy combinatorial logic.
Indexed reductions and window means are high-value baseline kernels for typed loop optimization.
Image dimension rounding and match-point extraction provide practical array indexing kernels.
Incremental rolling average logic is a concise, high-signal optimization target.
Nested Monte Carlo sampling loops and DF search objective are strong numeric training patterns.

skipped.reason: Thin strategy wrapper with constant-return methods offers little optimization signal.
Toy hello-world class is too trivial for GRPO conversion training.
Heavy BAM/pysam workflow and plotting stack are domain-bound and not standalone kernel material.
